domain: semiconductor, PCB assembly, electronics manufacturing fixtures, test sockets, and ESD-safe handling hardware

ideas.product_context: Used at a semiconductor process bench to move wafer cassettes between tools while minimizing static buildup and handling mistakes.
ideas.core_function: Supports a cassette in a controlled orientation with grippable side shields, locating stops, and a grounded contact path.
ideas.likely_main_part: Molded dissipative polymer cradle with integrated guide rails and contact pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines nested open volumes, asymmetric hand clearances, thin protective walls, and repeated rail-like features that must be represented without relying on simple box primitives.

ideas.idea_title: Fine-Pitch QFN Manual Test Socket Clamp
ideas.product_context: Used by electronics test technicians to validate small leadless IC packages during board bring-up or incoming inspection.
ideas.core_function: Holds a QFN package against spring probes with a hinged pressure lid, alignment nest, and latch that preserves repeatable contact force.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined socket body with hinged clamping lid and precision package pocket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires expressing a shallow package nest, hinge geometry, latch undercuts, probe-field clearance, and contact-pressure surfaces in one compact object.

ideas.product_context: Used in electronics manufacturing to cycle assembled boards through temperature and power-on burn-in before final shipment.
ideas.core_function: Guides a PCB into a connector plane, locks the board edge, and exposes airflow around heat-generating components.
ideas.likely_main_part: Rigid fixture frame with card guides, connector support shelf, and locking cam features.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests long parallel guide geometry, open-frame construction, cam-lock clearances, airflow cutouts, and board-retention features without concrete board dimensions.

ideas.idea_title: Pogo-Pin Programming Fixture for Panelized PCBs
ideas.product_context: Used on an assembly line to flash firmware into multiple boards before depanelization.
ideas.core_function: Aligns a panel to a pin bed and applies even top pressure while leaving visual access to status LEDs and fiducials.
ideas.likely_main_part: Two-level test fixture plate with alignment pins, relief pockets, and hinged compression bridge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges representation of arrays, layered plates, registration features, spring-contact keepouts, and hinged pressure structures.

ideas.product_context: Used at SMT receiving inspection to check tape-and-reel components without placing reels flat on a work surface.
ideas.core_function: Holds a component reel upright, controls tape feed direction, and provides a dissipative path to the bench mat.
ideas.likely_main_part: Adjustable reel support stand with side disks, axle cradle, and tape guide channel.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes rotational support geometry, sliding adjustment features, thin guide channels, and mixed cylindrical and planar structures.

ideas.product_context: Used during electronics repair or prototype rework to align a solder paste stencil over a BGA footprint.
ideas.core_function: Centers a stencil relative to board fiducials and constrains it flat while keeping the rework area accessible.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile alignment frame with corner clamps, fiducial viewing windows, and stencil retention lips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin frame modeling, transparent access openings, clamp clearances, edge lips, and precision alignment relationships.

ideas.product_context: Used beside automated or semi-automated test equipment to transfer fragile ICs from JEDEC trays into sockets.
ideas.core_function: Presents a single package in a repeatable orientation with bevelled lead-in surfaces and anti-rotation constraints.
ideas.likely_main_part: Precision package nest insert with chamfered pocket, datum stops, and vacuum-tool clearance.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Forces careful description of chamfers, shallow pockets, orientation keys, tool access reliefs, and very small contact-sensitive support surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Conformal Coating Masking Fixture for Connectors
ideas.product_context: Used during PCB conformal coating to protect connectors, switches, and test pads from overspray.
ideas.core_function: Covers selected board features with removable caps while locating from board edges and existing mounting holes.
ideas.likely_main_part: Reusable masking frame with compliant cap islands and alignment bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines distributed protective islands, bridge arms, flexible-looking caps, board-location bosses, and intentionally open areas for coating exposure.

ideas.product_context: Used at a pick-and-place machine to store and identify small vacuum nozzles during feeder setup changes.
ideas.core_function: Keeps nozzles separated, upright, and grounded while allowing quick visual identification and finger access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Dissipative organizer block with stepped pockets, label lands, and grounding strip channel.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests dense repeated pocket features, stepped bores, ergonomic finger scoops, label surfaces, and a contrasting conductive path.

ideas.product_context: Used in electronics assembly to place soft thermal pads onto processors, power modules, or heat-spreader locations consistently.
ideas.core_function: Indexes to a board or module and guides a pad into position without stretching, contaminating, or misaligning it.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat placement template with soft-pad window, anti-stick bevels, and detachable alignment ears.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing thin sheet geometry, large cutouts, removable alignment features, bevelled release edges, and delicate handling clearances.
